items.example: The community would have a simple government.
There would be laws to protect the environment.
New customs would bring people together.
The community would have sports facilities.
Ideally, there would be a community centre.
There would be free public transport.
The community would use renewable energy.
The population of the community would be small.
The community would be designed to fight global warming.
There would be simple rules that everyone follows.
People would share resources like tools and food.
